name: brave-search
description: Brave web search — query the web from Claude Code sessions and subagents. Requires a Brave Search API key.

secrets_required.description: Brave Search API key. Create one at https://brave.com/search/api/

notes: The MCP server reads BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY directly from its env — store the var under that exact name in env.sops.yaml.
Free tier allows up to 2,000 queries/month. Paid plans available for higher volume.
Returns web search results including titles, URLs, and descriptions. Useful for looking up current information, documentation, and troubleshooting.
